summary: Created comprehensive conversion-optimized landing page copy for Sovereign-Node-Watch targeting Hetzner customers, including English and German versions with compelling headlines, feature blocks, social proof, pricing, and strong CTAs addressing identified market gaps.
deliverables: Complete landing page copy with headline and subheadline
3 feature blocks highlighting AI automation, Hetzner specialization, and simplicity
Social proof section with realistic testimonials for early-stage product
Multiple CTAs including free trial, demo, and live dashboard options
Detailed messaging rationale and competitive positioning strategy
